definition: A neutral-centered directional score where 50 is neutral/mixed, >50 bullish/positive, <50 bearish/negative.
where_used: Used for Bollinger, MACD, RSI, ribbon, MA trend and consensus families.
caution: Do not treat higher as always better without checking direction context.

definition: A centered score where 0 is neutral, positive is bullish, negative is bearish.
where_used: Used when calculating consensus from family deviations from neutral.
caution: Range may be approximate depending on available inputs.

definition: A triage score for review urgency, not directional bullishness.
where_used: Used to rank assets in the screener.

definition: A score for reliability/clarity of a signal family or archetype.
where_used: Used to separate clean from noisy setups.
caution: High confidence does not guarantee outcome.

definition: A disagreement measure across signal families.
where_used: Low dispersion means families agree; high dispersion means conflict.
caution: High priority plus high dispersion may still be worth review, but needs caution.

definition: A multiplier that fades event-driven pressure back toward neutral over time.
where_used: Used in Bollinger and crossover scores.
caution: A stale event can remain visible but should not dominate.

definition: Incremental pressure from repeated recent watch candidates.
caution: Watch clusters are developmental, not confirmed.

definition: A standardized relationship measure used only for SETA relationship scoring.
where_used: Used for sentiment-price spread normalization in MACD/RSI relationship logic.
caution: Not intended to replace public comparable raw price indicators.

definition: Difference between sentiment and price versions of an indicator after appropriate scaling/normalization.
where_used: Used to capture sentiment leading/lagging price.
caution: Interpret with slope and crossover for best context.

definition: Change in an indicator or spread over time.
where_used: Used to capture improvement/deterioration and joint slope labels.
caution: Can be noisy on short windows.

definition: Neutral-centered event score for a fresh bullish/bearish crossover.
where_used: Used for sentiment MACD signal crossing price MACD signal.

definition: Rule-based setup classification derived from combinations of indicator states.
where_used: Used for readable summaries and risk notes.
caution: Archetypes are descriptive diagnostics, not trade instructions.
